summary.recommended_move: Move the highest-confidence AI-assisted authoring workflow into PRD review while burning down LMS sync and data-risk dependencies.
summary.data_note: Deterministic synthetic data modeled on interactive video learning SaaS discovery, adoption, support, sales, and launch-readiness workflows.

opportunities.problem: Designers lose time turning existing lecture videos into aligned checks for understanding.
opportunities.candidate_solution: Generate draft questions by Bloom level, then require instructor review before publish.

opportunities.workflow: LMS gradebook and assignment sync repair
opportunities.problem: Admins need fewer manual checks when assignments, rosters, and scores move through the LMS.
opportunities.candidate_solution: Add an integration health center with sync status, retry reason, and owner handoff.

opportunities.problem: Teams need faster caption workflows without losing trust in accessibility quality.
opportunities.candidate_solution: Add transcript confidence flags, human review states, and export readiness checks.

opportunities.problem: Teachers struggle to monitor group contribution and give feedback before final submission.
opportunities.candidate_solution: Create a live collaboration checkpoint with comments, contribution cues, and revision status.

opportunities.problem: Instructors can see engagement data but still need help deciding who needs remediation.
opportunities.candidate_solution: Rank learners by missed interactions, rewatch gaps, and late completion, with suggested follow-up.

opportunities.workflow: Course template reuse and content library governance
opportunities.problem: Program teams want reusable interactive course assets but need ownership, freshness, and usage clarity.
opportunities.candidate_solution: Create template library governance with owner, freshness, usage, and update prompts.

opportunities.problem: Facilitators need confidence that live responses are captured and recoverable during sessions.
opportunities.candidate_solution: Expose session health, response capture confirmation, and recovery steps during live delivery.

evidence.insight: Users asked for a clearer workflow before adding another creation tool.
Support volume spikes when setup steps and LMS states are unclear.
Activation improves when the workflow moves from draft to publish in one sitting.
Buyers ask how the platform proves learning impact and reduces instructor workload.
Participants understand the value but hesitate when ownership or next step is hidden.
The team needs clearer acceptance criteria before committing scope.

prd.problem_statement: Designers lose time turning existing lecture videos into aligned checks for understanding.
prd.job_to_be_done: When using ai-assisted interactive question authoring, a instructional designer needs a reliable next step so they can improve learning outcomes without adding manual coordination.
prd.non_goal: Do not create bespoke behavior for one institution until repeated signal appears across segments.
prd.user_story: As a instructional designer, I can use generate draft questions by bloom level, then require instructor review before publish.
prd.acceptance_criteria: Workflow state, owner, success event, error state, and customer-facing explanation are visible before launch.

prd.problem_statement: Admins need fewer manual checks when assignments, rosters, and scores move through the LMS.
prd.job_to_be_done: When using lms gradebook and assignment sync repair, a district technology admin needs a reliable next step so they can improve learning outcomes without adding manual coordination.
prd.non_goal: Do not create bespoke behavior for one institution until repeated signal appears across segments.
prd.user_story: As a district technology admin, I can use add an integration health center with sync status, retry reason, and owner handoff.
prd.acceptance_criteria: Workflow state, owner, success event, error state, and customer-facing explanation are visible before launch.

prd.user_story: As a k-12 teacher, I can use create a live collaboration checkpoint with comments, contribution cues, and revision status.
prd.acceptance_criteria: Workflow state, owner, success event, error state, and customer-facing explanation are visible before launch.

prd.acceptance_criteria: Workflow state, owner, success event, error state, and customer-facing explanation are visible before launch.
